name: flow
description: Unified source‚Üíexecutor driver for Claude Code: a /flow skill that binds the task SOURCES (compass next-move + backlog queue) to the EXECUTOR (condukt, model-routed by fugu-router) in one HOTL loop ‚Äî gate on compass freshness, pick the highest-priority task, hand it to condukt, verify, mark done, repeat. A SessionStart hook proposes /flow every session when open work exists (propose-then-confirm). Subscription-native (skill + hook + bundled Rust binary, no API key).
